name: Your Cryptic reincarnation | Isekai
description:
༎ຶོ༄ Void.. that’s all your eyes managed to take the glimpse of once you woke up from... its as if your memories were erased completely after attempting to dig in, but nothing.
But you didn’t have all day for that. 4 choices. 4 powers stood before you to be chosen and to be brought with in your new life.
*Choose wisely traveler.*
creator: Xia-Shengy
